briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to provides Get device id.

parameterdescription.para: used to store the Id code register values.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters
Fill IPI Payload
Send request to PLM using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to Get board.

parameterdescription.para: Address where PLM has to copy the board details
Max size available at destination for PLM to copy in words
Length of board data that PLM copied

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters
Fill IPI Payload
Send request to PLM using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to Tamper Trigger.

parameterdescription.para: To select the valid tamper response

listitem.para: Handoff to the Rom on success.

inbodydescription.para: Fill IPI Payload
Send request to PLM using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (XPlmi_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u32 sub_cmd, u64 Arg, u32 Len)
memberdef.name: XPlmi_EventLogging

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to Event Logging.

parameterdescription.para: Arguments to be passed for the sub command, for all sub commands Arg holds Address, whereas uart sub command Arg holds Arg1, Arg2 in upper and lower 32bit respectively

inbodydescription.para: Performs input parameters validation. Return error code if input parameters are invalid
Fill IPI Payload based on sub command
Send request to PLM using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to configure secure communication.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to structure which contains SLR index, IV1, IV2 and key

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters
Fill IPI Payload
Send request to PLM using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to get secure communication status.

parameterdescription.para: SLR number for which secure communication establishment status is needed
Pointer to variable to which secure communication status is to be written

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters
Fill IPI Payload
Send request to PLM using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to set DDRMC main registers status command.

inbodydescription.para: Fill IPI Payload
Send request to PLM using generic API

briefdescription.para: Adds the SLR Index.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to instance XPlmi_ClientInstance

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS - On valid input SlrIndex.
XST_FAILURE - On non valid input SlrIndex

memberdef.argsstring: (XPlmi_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u32 *PayloadBuf, u32 PayloadLen, u32 *ResponseBuf, u32 ResponseLen)
memberdef.name: XPlmi_SendRequest

briefdescription.para: This function sends request to PLM through either SMC or IPI mailbox based on the execution environment.

detaileddescription.para: For EL1 non-secure AArch64 applications, SMC is used. For other environments, IPI mailbox is used.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance (used for mailbox, can be NULL for SMC)
Pointer to payload buffer containing command and arguments
Length of payload buffer (number of u32 elements)
Pointer to store response values (can be NULL if response not needed)
Length of response buffer (number of u32 elements)

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid

simplesect.para: This is a generic API that internally handles SMC or Mailbox communication based on the build configuration.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters
Validate mailbox pointer for IPI communication
Send IPI request to PLM and wait for response
Cap ResponseLen: the mailbox shift below consumes Response[0], leaving RESPONSE_ARG_CNT - 1 data slots reachable via Response[Idx + 1U].

Copy IPI response data from InstancePtr->Response[] into caller's ResponseBuf. Skip Response[0] (PLM exec status, returned via Status) so ResponseBuf[0] holds the first data word, matching the SMC path layout.

briefdescription.para: Writes value to register.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written in register

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success error code on failure

briefdescription.para: Updates register value.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success error code on failure

briefdescription.para: Reads register value.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 Depth, u8 Width, u8 RefVoltage, u8 UserRegVal, u8 GlitchDetectorNum)
memberdef.name: XPlmi_ConfigureGlitchDetector

briefdescription.para: This function configures desired glitch detector.

parameterdescription.para: is the minimum voltage glitch detection depth
is the minimum glitch detector width
is the reference voltage for the glitch detector comparators
indicates to select the register values instead of the eFUSE values to configure the glitch detector
is the number of glitch detector to be configured

briefdescription.para: This function enables/disables the desired glitch detector.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of glitch detector to be enabled/disabled

briefdescription.para: This function reads the status of desired glitch detector.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of glitch detector whose status is to be read

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to perform in-place ASU update.

parameterdescription.para: Update flag (0 = use Image Store, 1 = use DDR)
PDI ID (Image Store) or DDR address

inbodydescription.para: Prepare payload for In-Place ASU update command
Send an IPI request to the PLM for In-Place ASU update

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to perform in-place ASU update from DDR.

parameterdescription.para: Update flag (should be 1 for DDR source)
Address of update PDI in DDR

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to perform in-place ASU update from Image Store.

parameterdescription.para: Update flag (should be 0 for Image Store source)

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to perform in-place PLM update.

listitem.para: Performs input parameters validation. Return error code if input parameters are invalid

inbodydescription.para: Fill IPI Payload

listitem.para: Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XPlmi_InPlacePlmUpdate CDO command Wait for IPI response from PLM with a timeout.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to perform in-place PLM update from DDR.
This function sends IPI request to perform in-place PLM update from Image Store.
Shift value to get higher 32 bit address.
Mask to extract 3 least significant bits from reference voltage.
Mask to extract 3 least significant bits from depth.
Mask to extract most significant bit from reference voltage.
Mask to extract 2 most significant bits from depth.
Shift value to place most significant bit of reference voltage.
Shift value to place 3 least significant bits of reference voltage.
Shift value to place 2 most significant bits of depth.
Shift value to place 3 least significant bits of depth.
Shift value to place bits of width.
Word size in bytes.
Bit position of glitch detector1 status.
